name: Dazzler
text: Rehearsal — Hero Action: Place 1 sound counter on a SONG in the Setlist without a sound counter on it → resolve the "Showtime!" effect on that SONG. (Limit once per phase).

name: Alison Blaire
text: Setup: Find Live Concert and put it into play under your control. Songwriter — Action: Search the top 5 cards of your deck for a SONG event and place it into your hand. (Limit once per round).

flavor: "Hi Ali. You look well." - Longshot
name: Longshot
text: Longshot enters play with 2 knife counters on him. Interrupt: When Longshot attacks an enemy, remove 1 knife counter from him → choose one: deal 2 damage to an enemy or stun a minion.

flavor: Dream little girl dream. No nightmares for you.
name: "A Little Girl's Dream"
text: Hero Action: Reduce the resource cost of the next ally or event you play this round by 3. Showtime!: Confuse a non-[[ELITE]] enemy.

name: "Beautiful Dreamer"
text: Hero Action (thwart): Remove 3 threat from a scheme. If this removes the last threat from that scheme, you may remove 2 threat from another scheme. Showtime!: Remove 2 threat from a scheme.

name: "Beauty And The Beast"
text: [[SONG]] Hero Action: Search your deck for an ally and put it into play. If that ally is still in play at the end of the phase, add it to your hand. Showtime!: Give a friendly character +2 THW until the end of the phase.

flavor: "I'm more than your Doll! I'm not your Barbie."
name: "Doll"
text: Hero Interrupt: When the villain would activate against you, cancel that activation. Showtime!: Give your identity a tough status card.

flavor: Hush now baby, the light is here. It'll chase the dark away.
name: "Hush Now Baby"
text: Hero Action: Stun and confuse an enemy. Showtime!: Each player draws 1 card.

flavor: We'll rise, like a Phoenix from the flame.
name: 'In The Darkest Light'
text: Hero Action: Deal 2 damage to each enemy.Showtime!: Stun a non-[[ELITE]] enemy.

flavor: I'm a mutant with a dream, just trying to connect.
name: "Out And Proud"
text: Hero Action: Defeat a non-[[ELITE]] minion. Showtime!: Heal 1 damage from each ally in play.

flavor: "I see right through you Rich Boy."
name: "Rich Angel"
text: Hero Interrupt (defense): When you would take any amount of damage from an attack, prevent all of that damage. Showtime!: Heal 2 damage from an identity.

flavor: "This will be our Garden of Eden!"
name: "The Serpent Is Coming"
text: Hero Action (attack): Deal 6 damage to an enemy. This attack gains ranged. Showtime!: Deal 2 damage to an enemy.

flavor: "I had a feeling this was too good to be true."
name: "Too Good To Be True"
text: Hero Action: Draw 3 cards. Choose and discard 1 card from your hand. Showtime!: Shuffle 3 cards from your discard pile into your deck.

flavor: The light from the velvet sky protects us.
name: "Velvet Sky"
text: Hero Interrupt: When a treachery is revealed from the encounter deck, cancel all of its effects and discard it. Showtime!: Remove a status card from a friendly character.

name: Lightbringr
text: Events attached to Lightbringr may be played as if they were in your hand. Reduce the resource cost of cards played this way by 1. Alter-Ego Action: Exhaust Lightbringr → attach 1 SONG event from your hand facedown here (to a maximum of 3).

flavor: "I'm the best at what I do. And what I do is rollerskate." - Dazzler
name: Dazzler's Rollerskates
text: Hero Action: Exhaust Dazzler's Rollerskates → ready Dazzler.

flavor: "I'm a singer not a fighter."
name: Sound Collector Suit
text: Dazzler gets +1 DEF. Resource: Exhaust Sound Collector Suit → generate a [energy] resource for a SONG or remove 1 sound counter from a SONG in the Setlist.

name: Live Concert
text: Permanent. Setup. Response: After you resolve a [[SONG]] event attach it here, placed in a row to the side of this card (to a maximum of 4). Once placed here, it cannot be swapped with a new card. This is the Setlist. Hero Action: Flip this card to its Showtime! side and reveal it.

name: Showtime!
text: Permanent. When Revealed: Resolve the "Showtime!" ability on each card in the Setlist, in any order. Then, discard all cards from the Setlist. If 4 cards were discarded this way, you may either deal 4 damage to an enemy or remove 4 threat from a scheme. Flip this card.

flavor: "OMG, it's Dazzler!" - Jubilee
name: Coolest Team-up Ever!
text: Team-Up (Dazzler and Jubilee). Max 1 per deck. Hero Interrupt: When a treachery card is revealed from the encounter deck, cancel its "When Revealed" effects, then choose to either Confuse or Stun up to 2 enemies in play.

name: Love From Beyond The Stars
text: Team-Up (Dazzler and Longshot). Max 1 per deck. Hero Action: Choose one: • Confuse an enemy. • Stun an enemy. Then, you may remove a sound counter from a Song in the Setlist and give Longshot a knife counter.

name: Love Song
text: Hero Action: Choose: • Remove 1+X threat from the main scheme. • Heal 1+X damage from a friendly character. Where X is the number of enemies in play with a status card on them.

name: Power Ballad
text: Reduce the cost to play Power Ballad by 2 if your identity is Dazzler, Jem, Lila Cheney, Luna Snow or Virgo. Hero Action: Choose: • Remove 2 threat from a scheme. • Deal 2 damage to an enemy.

flavor: It didn't actually sound anything like this song!
name: Tribute
text: Limit 1 per deck. Hero Action: After you play Tribute from your hand, choose 1 non-identity event in your collection. Tribute becomes a copy of that card, (except for its cost) but keeps the [[SONG]] trait, until it is placed in the discard pile.

flavor: "Everyone with a pulse...stand back." - Venus
name: Captivating Performance
text: Hero Action: If the next card you play this turn is a [[SONG]] event, stun an enemy.

flavor: "Wasp, I'd like for you to sing with me in the key of upper A." - Venus
name: Duet
text: Max 2 per deck. Response: After you play a SONG card, ready your hero and another friendly character.

flavor: "I wanted something more. I wanted to entertain." - Dazzler
name: Encore
text: Max 2 per deck. Hero Action: Search your discard pile for a [[SONG]] card and add it to your hand.

flavor: "But boy... YOU CAN'T PICK ME UP." - Lila Cheney
name: Song Of Aggression
text: Max 2 per deck. Hero Action (attack): Deal 1 damage to an enemy for each [[SONG]] card in your discard pile (to a maximum of 4).

flavor: "You guys interrupted my favorite number. Not cool." - Luna Snow
name: Song Of Justice
text: Max 2 per deck. Hero Action (thwart): Remove 1 threat from a scheme for each [[SONG]] card in your discard pile (to a maximum of 4).

flavor: "Let's rock! One! Two! Three! Four!" - Spider-Punk
name: Song Of Leadership
text: Hero Action: Exhaust an ally → heal damage from that ally equal to the amount of [[SONG]] cards in your discard pile (to a maximum of 4).

flavor: "Don't fight the name if the name fits!" - Mary Janes
name: Song Of Protection
text: Max 2 per deck. Hero Interrupt (defense): When a friendly character would take any amount of damage, reduce that damage by 1 for each [[SONG]] card in your discard pile (to a maximum of 4).

name: Karaoke Night
text: Action: Exhaust Karaoke Night and choose a SONG in the Setlist → resolve the 'Hero Action' of that card. Discard that card.
